---
title: "BioMIND beta website launched"
description: "The BioMIND beta website is being developed to showcase UCF research at the intersection of BioAI, molecular intelligence, complex systems, and trustworthy AI."
date: "2026-05-15"
categories: [announcement, cluster, website]
author: "BioMIND"
---

The BioMIND cluster's website is now online in **beta form**. This initial release establishes the cluster's public identity, navigation, and editorial structure ahead of broader content collection.

## What's in this release

- A homepage articulating BioMIND's mission across BioAI, molecular intelligence, networks, and discovery
- Research pages for each of the six cluster thrusts
- Lab pages for CASL, Human-CAIR, MoML, and AIAIR
- Placeholder structures for People, Publications, Seminars, Outreach, Funding, and Collaborators
- A maintainable Quarto + GitHub Pages infrastructure for ongoing edits

## What's next

- **Content collection.** Faculty and students are invited to submit bios, headshots, publication lists, and project descriptions. See the [README](https://github.com/biomind-eng/biomind) for the full checklist.
- **UCF branding.** Official UCF branding will be added once the appropriate approvals are in place.
- **Domain migration.** The site is currently published via GitHub Pages and will be migrated to an official UCF domain at the appropriate stage.

Comments and corrections are welcome — please open an issue on the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/biomind-eng/biomind/issues) or email the cluster coordinator.
